title: The Magical Island of Five Colors

scenes.text: This island is said to hold the colors of the rainbow!
This is Isla del Sol, located in Lake Titicaca, Bolivia.
According to local legend, it’s the birthplace of the sun god.
It's dotted with ancient Inca ruins.
scenes.label: ANCIENT INCAN RUINS

scenes.text: Follow for a new corner of Earth every day.

description: 📍 Isla del Sol, Lake Titicaca - Bolivia. A breathtaking island rich with legend and surrounded by stunning waters. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
